overall.description: A static nighttime view of a futuristic cyberpunk city skyline across a body of water, featuring illuminated glass skyscrapers and neon signage reflecting on the water surface. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting the Night City waterfront with atmospheric haze and artificial city lighting.

agents.ego_description: slowly drifting on water while observing the illuminated city skyline

entered.detail: tall illuminated glass skyscrapers with multiple lit windows forming the city skyline
green neon sign with 'softsys' text mounted on the right-side building complex
dark silhouette of industrial or commercial buildings along the waterfront
shimmering white light reflections on the dark water surface creating horizontal light streaks

segments.scene_description: A serene nighttime scene showing the Night City skyline from the water. The camera drifts slowly past the illuminated central skyscrapers while the green 'softsys' neon sign glows on the right. Light reflections shimmer across the water surface, and the hazy atmosphere creates a moody cyberpunk ambiance with no visible activity or movement other than the subtle water ripples.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, drifting camera movement across a dark waterfront that emphasizes the towering scale of a neon-lit cyberpunk skyline. It begins with a serene view of the city's central skyscrapers, their illuminated glass facades casting shimmering reflections across the rippling water. As the camera glides forward, the perspective shifts to bring a glowing green softsys neon sign into prominence on the right side of the frame. The scene then settles into a moody, atmospheric haze that softens the artificial city lights before the movement comes to a gentle halt against the backdrop of the silent metropolis.
